name: Elizabeth Mensah
learned: I am a student at CUNY School of Professional Studies | CUNY SPS, studying environmental science. I enjoy volunteering at local community gardens.
currently: I want to complete my thesis on urban sustainability.
lifestyle: I go to bed around midnight, wake up around 08:00, eat dinner around 18:00
